backlog.title: Action frequency progress bars

backlog.title: Board card entry / hand simulator
backlog.description: Add a simple random flop generator. When user selects a preflop position + range, show 3 random flop cards from the remaining deck. Add Turn and River buttons to progress streets. Store board in state, pass to solver API for postflop range generation.

backlog.title: Strategy/Ranges/Breakdown tab content
backlog.description: Right-side tabs already exist as buttons (Strategy, Ranges, Breakdown). Populate each tab: Strategy shows hand EV/equity/EQR/actions; Ranges shows top/bottom hands by EV; Breakdown shows suit combos and hand category distribution. Use solver API data.
backlog.test_cmd: cd apps/web && npx next build 2>&1 | tail -5

backlog.title: Postflop training mode
backlog.description: Add postflop training flow: select board → solver computes flop range → user navigates streets → action buttons for each street. Requires board simulator from 1b first. New mode toggle (Preflop/Postflop).
